payload.claim_text: The Committee authorized Interim President Sheridan or her designee to take action as necessary to support the NCBA implementation of E-ZPass toll collection at its Atlantic Beach Bridge facility. TBTA will sponsor NCBA's affiliate membership in the E-ZPass Interagency Group and NCBA will reimburse TBTA's costs.
payload.subject: NCBA E-ZPass Program

payload.claim_text: Starting this month, instead of operations and safety data, TBTA plans to give presentations highlighting various themes throughout the year to give the Committee a deeper view into the workings of TBTA. The theme of this month's presentation is TBTA's coordinated approach to work zone safety and distracted driving.
